race.comment: Open race to close out the card but it does start to thin out with the scratchings with several of the key players coming out and leaving the door ajar for CHANCE WITH WOLVES (3). He has put in a better showing at the past couple of starts and will be rock-hard fit for this. Gets 1.5kg off with the claim and maps ideally from two. Lots lining up for him now and think he can kick that door wide open and step on through. BOLERO (7) is a stayer resuming who should be hitting the line with gusto. Think he can present the biggest danger. STATE A FACT (12) continues to front up and race consistently. Should get more of the same from him.
